text:
Market today: The chip sector is officially in a bear market, which is hitting your concentrated tech holdings hard. The leveraged ETFs are feeling it the most. 

Your holdings: SOXL (-46.77%) and SPAL (-47.83%) are in rough shape. QQQ (-2.7%), SMH (-12.55%), and QQQI (-3.9%) are also down and flagged for attention. CRWD (12.9%) and SPY (1.21%) are holding up. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and AMD as they show up on the scanner, despite the sector weakness.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your deeply underwater leveraged positions and the broader chip sector downturn.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming if you can't stomach further 3x leveraged losses, especially with the sector bear market.
SPAL: Same as SOXL, this leveraged ETF is seeing major pain. Reassess your risk tolerance.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
